questions.q: Which statement is most accurate about AI-generated deepfake media
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: It can be used for impersonation, fraud ,and misinformation
It is always easy to detect
questions.explanation: Deepfakes are a serious generative AI risk in cybercrime and investigations.

questions.q: In AI-assisted investigations, what does “auditability” mean?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: The AI process can be reviewed and traced
questions.explanation: Auditability means decisions and processing steps can be examined later

questions.q: Which is the best practice when using AI-generated summaries of seized documents?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: AI summaries can miss or distort details, so originals must be checked.

questions.q: Why should sensitive case details not be entered into public AI tools?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: They may create privacy and confidentiality risks
questions.explanation: Confidential data should be protected from unauthorized exposure.

questions.q: What is an adversarial prompt?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: A prompt designed to mislead or manipulate the AI system
questions.explanation: Adversarial prompts are crafted to exploit weaknesses in AI behavior.

questions.q: Which LLM setting is most suitable for consistent factual answers?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Lower temperature makes outputs more focused and less random.

questions.q: What is the biggest danger of using generative AI to create synthetic evidence?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: It can mislead investigations and courts
questions.explanation: Synthetic evidence can damage fairness, legality, and truth-finding.

questions.q: Which method best reduces hallucination in an LLM used for official work?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Verified sources and document grounding reduce unsupported AI claims.

questions.q: Why is human-in-the-loop oversight important in high-stakes AI use?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: It ensures human review and accountability
questions.explanation: Human oversight helps prevent blind reliance on AI in sensitive decisions.

questions.q: What is a jailbreak attempt in LLM usage?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Trying to bypass safety rules or restrictions
questions.explanation: Jailbreaks are attempts to make the model ignore its safety or policy constraints

questions.q: Which risk occurs when an LLM reveals sensitive information from its training or prompt data?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Privacy leakage happens when confidential or sensitive information is exposed.

questions.q: Which is the safest use of an LLM in FIA-style case analysis?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Assisting with summarization while humans verify results
questions.explanation: AI should support human investigators, not replace verification and accountability.

questions.q: In an official investigation, why should LLM-generated legal references be verified?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: LLMs can produce convincing but false legal or factual references.

questions.q: What is a prompt injection attack?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: An attempt to manipulate an AI model through malicious instructions
questions.explanation: Prompt injection tries to override or manipulate the model’s intended behavior.

questions.q: Which company developed ChatGPT?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: ChatGPT is a conversational AI system developed by OpenAI.

questions.q: Which company developed LLaMA?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: LLaMA is Meta’s family of language models.

questions.q: Which company developed Gemini?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Gemini is Google’s AI model family.

questions.q: Which company developed Claude?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Claude is Anthropic’s AI chatbot/model family.

questions.q: What is the main purpose of an AI chatbot?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Chatbots use NLP/LLMs to interact with users in human language.

questions.q: Which use of LLMs is helpful for students?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: LLMs can support learning when used ethically.

questions.q: What is plagiarism risk in using Generative AI?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Copying AI-generated work without proper review or attribution
questions.explanation: AI output should be used responsibly and according to rules.

questions.q: Which practice helps reduce hallucinations?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Requesting sources or using retrieved documents
questions.explanation: Grounding answers in sources reduces unsupported claims.

questions.q: Why should AI-generated legal or official content be reviewed by a human?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: Human review is important for accuracy and accountability.

questions.q: What is a limitation of LLMs?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: They may generate outdated or incorrect information
questions.explanation: LLMs can be wrong and may need verification.

questions.q: What is a user prompt?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: The instruction entered by the user
questions.explanation: The user prompt tells the AI what task to perform.

questions.q: What is a system prompt usually used for?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
questions.explanation: A system prompt defines the overall behavior or role of the AI.

questions.q: Which task is an example of multimodal AI usage?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Reading an image and answering questions about it
questions.explanation: Multimodal systems can understand both visual and textual information.

questions.q: What is multimodal AI?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: AI that processes text ,images, audio or video
questions.explanation: Multimodal AI can work with more than one type of input.

questions.q: Which is an example of few-shot prompting?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Giving two translated examples before asking for a new translation
questions.explanation: Examples help the model follow the required pattern.

questions.q: What is few-shot prompting?
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Providing a few examples in the prompt
questions.explanation: Few-shot prompting guides the model by showing sample inputs and outputs.

questions.q: What is zero-shot prompting
questions.urdu: اس سوال کو وضاحت کے ساتھ پڑھیں
options: Asking a model to perform a task without examples
questions.explanation: Zero-shot means the model performs a task without task-specific examples.
